odeComponent.htmlView:
Completa la siguiente rúbrica

%7B%22typeGame%22%3A%22Rubric%22%2C%22version%22%3A2%2C%22id%22%3A%22idevice-1782394098548-ie590fwxw%22%2C%22table%22%3A%7B%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20la%20exposici%F3n%20oral%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Habla%22%2C%22Vocabulario%22%2C%22Volumen%22%2C%22Comprensi%F3n%22%2C%22Postura%20del%20cuerpo%20y%20contacto%20visual%22%2C%22Contenido%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20gran%20%20claridad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20del%20tiempo%2C%20habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20claridad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Unas%20veces%20habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20claridad%2C%20pero%20otras%20se%20acelera%20y%20se%20le%20entiende%20mal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Habla%20r%E1pido%20o%20se%20detiene%20demasiado%20a%20la%20hora%20de%20hablar.%20Adem%E1s%20su%20pronunciaci%F3n%20no%20es%20buena.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20Aumenta%20el%20vocabulario%20de%20la%20audiencia%20definiendo%20las%20palabras%20que%20podr%EDan%20ser%20nuevas%20para%20%E9sta.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20Incluye%201-2%20palabras%20que%20podr%EDan%20ser%20nuevas%20para%20la%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20audiencia%2C%20pero%20no%20las%20define.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20No%20incluye%20vocabulario%20que%20podr%EDa%20ser%20nuevo%20para%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20varias%20%285%20o%20m%E1s%29%20palabras%20o%20frases%20que%20no%20son%20entendidas%20por%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20a%20trav%E9s%20de%20toda%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20al%20menos%2090%25%20del%20tiempo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20al%20menos%20el%2080%25%20del%20tiempo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20con%20frecuencia%20es%20muy%20d%E9bil%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20casi%20todas%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20unas%20pocas%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20no%20puede%20contestar%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22A%20la%20hora%20de%20hablar%20la%20postura%20y%20el%20gesto%20son%20muy%20adecuados.%20Mira%20a%20todos%20los%20compa%F1eros%20con%20total%20naturalidad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20del%20tiempo%20la%20postura%20y%20el%20gesto%20son%20adecuados%20y%20casi%20siempre%20mira%20a%20%20%20los%20compa%F1eros%20mientras%20habla.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunas%20veces%2C%20mantiene%20la%20postura%20y%20%20el%20gesto%20adecuados%2C%20y%20otras%20no.%20En%20ocasiones%20mira%20a%20sus%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20mantiene%20la%20postura%20y%20gesto%20propios%20de%20una%20exposici%F3n%20oral%20y%2C%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20no%20mira%20a%20sus%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20completo%20entendimiento%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20buen%20entendimiento%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20buen%20entendimiento%20de%20partes%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20parece%20entender%20muy%20bien%20el%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%5D%5D%7D%2C%22title%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%20para%20evaluar%20la%20exposici%F3n%20oral%22%2C%22categories%22%3A%5B%22Habla%22%2C%22Vocabulario%22%2C%22Volumen%22%2C%22Comprensi%F3n%22%2C%22Postura%20del%20cuerpo%20y%20contacto%20visual%22%2C%22Contenido%22%5D%2C%22scores%22%3A%5B%224%20Excelente%22%2C%223%20Satisfactorio%22%2C%222%20Mejorable%22%2C%221%20Insuficiente%22%5D%2C%22descriptions%22%3A%5B%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20gran%20%20claridad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20del%20tiempo%2C%20habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20claridad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Unas%20veces%20habla%20despacio%20y%20con%20claridad%2C%20pero%20otras%20se%20acelera%20y%20se%20le%20entiende%20mal.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Habla%20r%E1pido%20o%20se%20detiene%20demasiado%20a%20la%20hora%20de%20hablar.%20Adem%E1s%20su%20pronunciaci%F3n%20no%20es%20buena.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20Aumenta%20el%20vocabulario%20de%20la%20audiencia%20definiendo%20las%20palabras%20que%20podr%EDan%20ser%20nuevas%20para%20%E9sta.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20Incluye%201-2%20palabras%20que%20podr%EDan%20ser%20nuevas%20para%20la%20mayor%20parte%20de%20la%20audiencia%2C%20pero%20no%20las%20define.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20vocabulario%20apropiado%20para%20la%20audiencia.%20No%20incluye%20vocabulario%20que%20podr%EDa%20ser%20nuevo%20para%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Usa%20varias%20%285%20o%20m%E1s%29%20palabras%20o%20frases%20que%20no%20son%20entendidas%20por%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20a%20trav%E9s%20de%20toda%20la%20presentaci%F3n.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20al%20menos%2090%25%20del%20tiempo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20es%20lo%20suficientemente%20alto%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia%20al%20menos%20el%2080%25%20del%20tiempo.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20volumen%20con%20frecuencia%20es%20muy%20d%E9bil%20para%20ser%20escuchado%20por%20todos%20los%20miembros%20de%20la%20audiencia.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20casi%20todas%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20puede%20con%20precisi%F3n%20contestar%20unas%20pocas%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22El%20estudiante%20no%20puede%20contestar%20las%20preguntas%20planteadas%20sobre%20el%20tema%20por%20sus%20compa%F1eros%20de%20clase.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22A%20la%20hora%20de%20hablar%20la%20postura%20y%20el%20gesto%20son%20muy%20adecuados.%20Mira%20a%20todos%20los%20compa%F1eros%20con%20total%20naturalidad.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22La%20mayor%EDa%20del%20tiempo%20la%20postura%20y%20el%20gesto%20son%20adecuados%20y%20casi%20siempre%20mira%20a%20%20%20los%20compa%F1eros%20mientras%20habla.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Algunas%20veces%2C%20mantiene%20la%20postura%20y%20%20el%20gesto%20adecuados%2C%20y%20otras%20no.%20En%20ocasiones%20mira%20a%20sus%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20mantiene%20la%20postura%20y%20gesto%20propios%20de%20una%20exposici%F3n%20oral%20y%2C%20la%20mayor%EDa%20de%20las%20veces%2C%20no%20mira%20a%20sus%20compa%F1eros.%22%7D%5D%2C%5B%7B%22weight%22%3A%224%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20completo%20entendimiento%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%223%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20buen%20entendimiento%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%222%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22Demuestra%20un%20buen%20entendimiento%20de%20partes%20del%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%2C%7B%22weight%22%3A%221%22%2C%22text%22%3A%22No%20parece%20entender%20muy%20bien%20el%20tema%20que%20expone.%22%7D%5D%5D%2C%22instructions%22%3A%22%3Cp%3ECompleta%20la%20siguiente%20r%FAbrica%3C/p%3E%22%2C%22visible-info%22%3Afalse%2C%22author%22%3A%22CEDEC%22%2C%22author-url%22%3A%22http%3A//cedec.intef.es/%22%2C%22license%22%3A%22CC-BY-SA%22%2C%22i18n%22%3A%7B%22rubric%22%3A%22R%FAbrica%22%2C%22activity%22%3A%22Actividad%22%2C%22name%22%3A%22Nombre%22%2C%22date%22%3A%22Fecha%22%2C%22score%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22notes%22%3A%22Notas%22%2C%22download%22%3A%22Descargar%22%2C%22msgDelete%22%3A%22%BFSeguro%20que%20desea%20borrar%20todos%20los%20campos%20del%20formulario%3F%22%2C%22reset%22%3A%22Reiniciar%22%2C%22print%22%3A%22Imprimir%22%2C%22apply%22%3A%22Aplicar%22%2C%22newWindow%22%3A%22Ventana%20nueva%22%2C%22msgEndGameScore%22%3A%22Completa%20la%20r%FAbrica%20antes%20de%20guardar%20tu%20puntuaci%F3n.%22%2C%22msgScoreScorm%22%3A%22La%20puntuaci%F3n%20no%20se%20puede%20guardar%20porque%20esta%20p%E1gina%20no%20forma%20parte%20%20de%20un%20paquete%20SCORM.%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveScore%22%3A%22%A1Solo%20puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20una%20vez%21%22%2C%22msgYouScore%22%3A%22Su%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgOnlySaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%20Solo%20puedes%20completarla%20una%20vez.%22%2C%22msgSaveAuto%22%3A%22Tu%20puntuaci%F3n%20se%20guardar%E1%20autom%E1ticamente%20despu%E9s%20de%20cada%20cambio.%22%2C%22msgSeveralScore%22%3A%22Puede%20guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%20tantas%20veces%20como%20quiera%22%2C%22msgYouLastScore%22%3A%22La%20%FAltima%20puntuaci%F3n%20guardada%20es%22%2C%22msgActityComply%22%3A%22Ya%20ha%20realizado%20esta%20actividad.%22%2C%22msgPlaySeveralTimes%22%3A%22Puede%20realizar%20esta%20actividad%20cuantas%20veces%20quiera%22%2C%22msgScore%22%3A%22Puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22msgWeight%22%3A%22Peso%22%7D%2C%22isScorm%22%3A0%2C%22textButtonScorm%22%3A%22Guardar%20la%20puntuaci%F3n%22%2C%22repeatActivity%22%3Atrue%2C%22weighted%22%3A100%7D
